author: sipho.ndaba
body: Can we tighten the :40 talk segment to 4 minutes so the music sweep lands before the news? It is running long on Mondays.

author: asha
body: Agreed, let us trial 4 minutes from Thursday and review after a week.

author: naledi.tau
body: Power current frequency might be too high for the gold-leaning weekend audience. Worth splitting the policy by daypart.

author: asha
body: Good point. I will draft a weekend variant and link it under Weekend Show Clocks.

author: n.khumalo
body: Our SA local content sat at 38 percent in drive last week. ICASA minimum is comfortable but let us not slip. Please flag anything under 35.

author: sipho.ndaba
body: Will add an automated weekly flag from the logger so we catch shortfalls early.

author: n.khumalo
body: Reminder to all presenters: the watershed runs 21:00 to 05:00. Anything borderline before then must be cleared with me first.

author: asha
body: Noted. The correction log link at the bottom is broken, can someone point it to the new page?

author: sipho.ndaba
body: Added the Zetta login step. New stand-in starts Monday so this needs to be current.

author: naledi.tau
body: Studio B is double-booked Wednesday 10:00. Production session for the Youth Day promo should take it since on-air is in Studio A.

author: n.khumalo
body: All live reads must be clearly separated from editorial. Please re-read this before any sponsored segment this week.

author: naledi.tau
body: Bumped the backup playout silence trigger to 8 seconds after the false start last Friday. Seems stable now.

author: asha
body: For Youth Day on 16 June we are running a local artists special across the full show. Sipho has the music block ready.

author: sipho.ndaba
body: Music block locked and loaded into the log. Just need the sponsor read approved.

author: asha
body: The social media policy section is clear, thanks. Can we add guidance on tagging the station handle on Instagram?

author: n.khumalo
body: Licence renewal window opens early next year. I will start the paperwork and keep this summary updated.

author: naledi.tau
body: OB codec link test passed for the Saturday mall broadcast. Backup 4G bonding confirmed working.

author: asha
body: Quick one on the voice-tracking steps for Zetta, the screenshot is out of date after the last update.
